message:
feat(tui): integrate bubbles/list for pane list rendering (br-a6cs7)

- Replace inline pane row rendering with m.paneList.View() in renderPaneList
- Sync m.cursor with paneList.Select() on keyboard navigation
- Sync on mouse wheel scrolling and click selection
- Update delegate dimensions dynamically for each render
- Preserve header row and activity summary line above list

This enables fuzzy filtering support via the existing paneList infrastructure
while maintaining visual consistency with the existing pane row design.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
